summary: Iteration 129: Rewards System Phase 3 (Gamification & Badges) + Phase 4 (Admin Tools Enhancement) - All features working. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Badge system properly seeds 14 default badges with condition_type/condition_value for auto-awarding
User search autocomplete has 300ms debounce and requires 2+ characters
Manual adjustment creates audit trail with admin name and reason in metadata
Badge enable/disable toggle works correctly for master admin
MyRewardsPage properly shows earned vs locked badges with visual distinction
Open Rewards Store button correctly uses email parameter instead of user_id
seed_data_creation: N/A - Used existing badge definitions seeded by backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 & 4 fully tested. Badge system has 14 default badges. MyRewardsPage at /my-rewards shows Badges & Achievements section with 0/14 earned for admin (no trading activity). Admin Rewards page at /admin/rewards has two tabs: User Lookup (search autocomplete, manual adjustment, transaction history) and Badge Management (edit/disable badges). Search 'riz' returns Rizza Miles (rank #5, 110 points). The 'Badges & Achievements' section text is visible in screenshots but querySelector may not find it due to rendering.

endpoint_get_badges.notes: Returns 14 badge definitions with id, name, description, icon, category, condition_type, condition_value, sort_order

endpoint_user_badges.notes: Returns badges with earned/locked status and earned_at timestamp

features: Locked badges grid with names and descriptions

rewards_store_button.notes: Correctly uses email parameter instead of user_id

user_search_autocomplete.notes: Requires 2+ chars, returns matching users by name or email, dropdown appears after 300ms debounce

manual_point_adjustment.notes: Creates audit trail in rewards_point_logs with adjusted_by, adjusted_by_name, reason

admin_badge_management.notes: Master admin can edit name, description, icon and enable/disable badges
